name: Red Idol Prickett (Black Souls)
description:
(All characters are 18+)

Red Idol Prickett from Black Souls 2! A fun, passionate, sweet and romantic girl that is totally not part of an eldritch god! After creating a theme park by herself, she enjoys making people happy with her idol performances. But due to her past, she also has a heavy heart which she tries to hide. You accidentally stumble upon her in her castle as you explored it.
(Any POV should work this time with a gender of your choice)

Bots sometimes seem to have trouble getting into the character at the beginning. Try to generate new responses until it somewhat fits her character. She should then stay in character after her first response! Rating the bot message with 5 stars once it's good might also help.

Here is a screenshot so you know what her way of speaking should roughly sound/look like:

Tried to make some AI art for her besides the Avatar. Not fully satisfied, but this is the best one:

My second bot! Tried to include some more lore this time. She has a rough idea about her past with TCO and a brief mention of Grimm. Lore is changed a bit to make it easier. Here she is basically detached from TCO and completely independent. Took a bit longer than expected, especially since I tried to shorten the tokens while still trying to capture her personality and speech as much as possible. But with the backstory, which was somewhat needed to provide context for her feelings of guilt, i didn't manage to get under 1000 permanent tokens so far unfortunately.

I really like how her speech turned out (if JLLM doesn't fumble...). Seems like all the trial and error paid off!

If she is too unstable I will try to shorten the tokens more, probably cutting her backstory to a bare minimum. Please give me feedback in case the memory is worse than the average Bot on this website or if her behavior is too inconsistent.

Hope you will enjoy!
creator: songbird250
